offer: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inefficient scheduling of safety inspections causes compliance issues that can lead to fines. We automate the scheduling and tracking instead of relying on manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Difficulty in scheduling and tracking safety inspections leads to compliance issues and potential fines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for inspection dates and reminders
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
